operatorAccreditation.heading: [Welsh] Apply for accreditation
operatorAccreditation.title: [Welsh] How to apply for accreditation
operatorAccreditation.guidance001: [Welsh] Before you apply for accreditation you’ll need to either:
operatorAccreditation.guidance003: [Welsh] have applied to register but not yet had a decision from your regulator
operatorAccreditation.guidance004:
[Welsh] The regulations allow regulators up to 12 weeks to approve your registration and accreditation applications. If these are submitted at the same time, the 12 week determination period will cover both applications.
There are separate charges for applying for registration and accreditation.
operatorAccreditation.guidance005: [Welsh] If your application is refused, you will need to pay the charges again if you reapply.
